    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.closeAndForget()
    Close the connection, all associated streams will be closed before.
    QuicConnection

    Close the connection, all associated streams will be closed before.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.closeHandler(Runnable handler)
    Set a handler called when the connection is closed.
    QuicConnection

    Connect to a Quic server at the specific port and host.

    Connect to a Quic server at the specific port and host, with specific options.

    Connect to a Quic server.
    QuicConnection

    Connect to a Quic server with specific options.
    QuicConnection
    QuicStream.connection()
     
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.datagramHandler(Consumer<io.vertx.core.buffer.Buffer> handler)
    Set a handler called with the datagram addressed to this connection.
    static QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.newInstance(io.vertx.core.net.QuicConnection delegate)
    Creates a new instance of the QuicConnection.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.openStreamAndForget()
    Open a bidirectional stream to the remote endpoint.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.openStreamAndForget(boolean bidirectional)
    Open a stream to the remote endpoint with bidirectional parameter specifying its directionality.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.shutdownAndForget()
    Shutdown with a 30 seconds timeout.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.shutdownAndForget(Duration timeout)
    Initiate a graceful connection shutdown, the connection is taken out of service and closed when all the inflight streams are processed, otherwise after a timeout the connection will be closed.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.shutdownAndForget(Duration timeout, io.vertx.core.net.QuicConnectionClose payload)
    Initiate a graceful connection shutdown, the connection is taken out of service and closed when all the inflight streams are processed, otherwise after a timeout the connection will be closed.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.shutdownHandler(Consumer<Duration> handler)
    Set a handler notified when the connection is shutdown: the client or server will close the connection within a certain amount of time.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.streamHandler(Consumer<QuicStream> handler)
    Set a handler processing incoming Quic streams.
    QuicConnection
    QuicConnection.writeDatagramAndForget(io.vertx.core.buffer.Buffer buffer)
    Send a datagram.

    QuicServer.connectHandler(Consumer<QuicConnection> handler)
